title: Australian Pumpkin Pie
description: A classic Australian dessert made with a flaky crust and a delicious pumpkin filling.

ingredients.name: delicate spices
ingredients.notes: additional spices such as nutmeg or ginger can be added to taste

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place into a 9-inch pie dish.
Mix the mashed pumpkin, sugar, spices, and pie filling in a large bowl until well combined.
Beat in the egg and heavy cream until the mixture is smooth.
Pour the pumpkin mixture into the pastry-lined pie dish.
Bake the pie for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
